---
title: "ConvergenceMode"
generated: true
description: "The iteration strategy selecting how :func:`run_iterations` loops."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._converge`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:ConvergenceMode -->
```python
ConvergenceMode = Literal['fixed', 'early_exit']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:ConvergenceMode -->
The iteration strategy selecting how `run_iterations` loops.

`'fixed'` runs a fixed-length `lax.scan`: reproducible,
reverse-differentiable, and `vmap`-batchable.  `'early_exit'` runs a
windowed cost-slope `lax.while_loop` (see [`Convergence`](../nitrix-register/Convergence.qmd)) that stops
once the cost has plateaued; it is offered single-pair and is not
reverse-differentiable.  This mode is orthogonal to the [`Convergence`](../nitrix-register/Convergence.qmd)
threshold/window pair, which is consulted only when `'early_exit'` is chosen.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
